eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Berrien; Cass; St. Joseph; Calhoun; Kalamazoo; Van Buren; Allegan; Barry; Eaton; Clinton; Kent; Ottawa; Muskegon; Montcalm; Ionia; Gratiot, MI; at 11:33 AM on MAY 14, 2019 Effective until 1:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AMBER ALERT FOR ENDANGERED MISSING FAITH CYNDORA MARTINEZ BLACK FEMALE AGE 4. LAST SEEN WITH HER MOTHER PETTRA ALIESHA YAHYA AGE 30 BLACK FEMALE. 5FT. 160LBS. DRIVING A 2005 RED BUICK RENDEVOUS LICENSE PLATE EBD2873 Call Kentwood Police Department at 616-698-6580 or 911
